_comment: Confirmed-working versions. Run scripts/check-provider-updates.sh to check for updates.

ccusage.schema_notes: daily --json: {daily: [{period, totalCost, totalTokens, inputTokens, outputTokens, cacheReadTokens, cacheCreationTokens, modelBreakdowns: [{modelName, cost, inputTokens, outputTokens, cacheReadTokens, cacheCreationTokens}]}]}

codexbar.schema_notes: usage --provider <name> --json: [{provider, source, usage: {primary: {usedPercent, windowMinutes, resetsAt, resetDescription}, secondary: {...}}}]. Query providers individually; use --source cli for codex to avoid browser OAuth prompts.

pystray.platform_notes: Mac: AppKit, Win: win32, Linux: AppIndicator3 (requires libayatana-appindicator3)
